item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the requested N+1 manual gate immediately, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding manual checks after each downstream error, refuses a permanent entrance verifier as the default, and moves upstream to root causes such as rules, system validation, field references, templates, and master data. It proposes consolidation, removal of replaceable gates, system constraints, automation, trigger/exit conditions, and only a bounded one-time emergency check, so it meets the positive anti-spiral criteria without directly adding another standing manual checkpoint."}
